title: Greg Hinz: The Bears wanted a deal. Springfield chose caution.
description:

title: Dean of Vincennes University Jasper campus to step down
description:
Vincennes University announced Monday that Adam Watkins will step down as assistant vice president and dean of the university's campus in Jasper at the end of this month.
